name: google-sheets-mcp-and-skill
summary: Google Sheets integration for AI tools: a pure core library wrapped by an MCP server and a CLI (skill-packageable). Read-side richness is the thesis — losslessly read values + formulas, cell formatting, and conditional-format rules in a compact, structured, token-efficient form — with full CRUD symmetry (anything writable is readable back), structure-aware reads, and multi-format output (text/json/jsonl/csv/tsv/markdown).
author: Colin Murray
